author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 8: 2 Tier-3 docs (net pivot cont'd).

net/skbuff.md (240 lines, 15 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open) — sk_buff packet container + GRO + GSO + frag-list + skb queue + datagram helpers + fclone fast-clone + zerocopy. struct sk_buff + skb_shared_info layout-equivalence for first-cache-line. TLA+ model models/net/skb_clone.tla owned here (mandatory L2). secmark LSM-tag propagation.

net/netdev.md (262 lines, 15 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open) — net_device + net_device_ops vtable + NAPI poll framework + per-queue arrays + link-state watcher + address lists + devmem DMA-buf RX + ethtool integration + XDP attachment. /sys/class/net/* + rtnetlink wire-format byte-identity. TLA+ models napi_state + rtnl_lock owned here (both mandatory L2).

Total .design/ docs: 55.
